# iosxe_bgp_bmp_server (Resource)

This resource can manage the BGP BMP Server configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_bgp_bmp_server" "example" {
  asn                    = "65000"
  server_id              = 1
  address                = "10.10.10.10"
  port_number            = 1790
  activate               = true
  failure_retry_delay    = 30
  flapping_delay         = 60
  initial_delay          = 10
  stats_reporting_period = 30
  update_source_loopback = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asn` (String)
- `server_id` (Number) BMP Server Number
  - Range: `1`-`4`

### Optional

- `activate` (Boolean) Initiate connection to BMP server
- `address` (String) BMP Server Address
- `delete_mode` (String) Configure behavior when deleting/destroying the resource. Either delete the entire object (YANG container) being managed, or only delete the individual resource attributes configured explicitly and leave everything else as-is. Default value is `all`.
  - Choices: `all`, `attributes`
- `description` (String) Textual description of BMP server
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `failure_retry_delay` (Number) Failure retry delay in sending BMP server updates
  - Range: `1`-`3600`
- `flapping_delay` (Number) Flapping delay in sending BMP server updates
  - Range: `1`-`3600`
- `initial_delay` (Number) Initial delay in sending BMP server updates
  - Range: `1`-`3600`
- `ip_dscp` (String) DSCP value
  - Choices: `0`, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`, `7`
- `port_number` (Number) - Range: `1`-`65535`
- `stats_reporting_period` (Number) Stats reporting period for BMP server
  - Range: `1`-`3600`
- `update_source_gigabit_ethernet` (String) GigabitEthernet IEEE 802.3z
- `update_source_loopback` (Number) Loopback interface
- `update_source_ten_gigabit_ethernet` (String) Ten Gigabit Ethernet
- `update_source_vlan` (Number) Iosxr Vlans

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_bgp_bmp_server.example "<asn>,<server_id>"
```
